qa_pairs.question: Which SSH clients are compatible with the new configuration on OS X systems?
qa_pairs.answer: On OS X, compatible SSH clients include OpenSSH 7.4p1 with OpenSSL 1.0.2k (Homebrew) and OpenSSH 7.9p1 with LibreSSL 2.7.3 (OS X 10.14.5). Users can determine their exact SSH client version using the command `ssh -V`.

qa_pairs.question: What are some of the compatible SSH clients for Windows systems with the updated SSH configuration?
qa_pairs.answer: Compatible SSH clients for Windows systems include MobaXterm Home Edition v11.1, PuTTY 0.72, and Windows Services for Linux (WSL) v1. For WSL, specifically Ubuntu 18.04 with OpenSSH_7.6p1 and openSUSE Leap 15.1 with OpenSSH_7.9p1 are listed as compatible.
